title: Delhi High Court grants bail to Sukesh Chandrasekhar's wife Leena Paulose in ED case; no relief in MCOCA case
description: The Delhi High Court today granted bail to Leena Paulose, wife of alleged conman Sukesh Chandrasekhar, in a money laundering case registered by the Enforcement Directorate (ED) in connection with a ₹200 crore extortion case.Paulose, however, will remain in jail as the Court rejected her bail plea in a related case registered by the Delhi Police's Economic Offences Wing (EOW) under the Maharashtra Control of Organised Crime Act (MCOCA).Justice Prateek Jalan pronounced the verdict in bail app
